instance_arn.description: ARN of the AWS SSO instance to which the managed policy will be attached; must be a valid and existing SSO instance ARN.

managed_policy_arn.description: ARN of the managed policy to attach; must be a valid AWS managed policy ARN.

permission_set_arn.description: ARN of the permission set to which the managed policy will be attached; must be a valid Amazon Resource Name format.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration allowed for create, read, update, and delete operations, ensuring efficient resource management.
